name: Tim Kaine
subject: Use of force in Syria
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

Last Thursday night, President Trump ordered U.S. forces to bomb an airfield in Syria in retaliation for a chemical attack on civilians.

I have always said that we must respond to human rights violations and to leaders who commit terrible acts against their own people. This kind of violence is never acceptable and the United States, along with other nations, has a responsibility to act.

However, I have deep concerns about the fact that President Trump did not seek an authorization for use of military force from Congress before initiating a missile strike. **The U.S. Constitution requires Congress to authorize any use of military force unless our country is directly threatened** \-- and it was not in this case.

**[Will you stand with me and add your name if you agree that Congress must hold a vote on any use of military force in Syria?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=eQrFxTl3a50oRwkuL%2FY4Q0GulAYyifdN)**

There's a reason our Constitution requires Congress to approve uses of military force. It's to avoid a situation in which a president starts a war for their own executive purposes. This sets us apart from virtually any nation in the world. In our system, a President doesn't just get to decide on his own to fire missiles at another nation.

I took the same position when President Obama was in office. I argued that the President needed to come to Congress before any military action was taken against the Assad regime in Syria. I also argued that once our actions went on the offensive against ISIS in Iraq and Syria, that the President needed approval from Congress.

Conflicts come and go, but our rule of law must hold fast. This is not to say the U.S. doesn't have a role to play in aiding humanitarian crises -- it surely does. And there are times when military force is appropriate -- _when authorized by Congress_. But I will continue to insist that we uphold the Constitution and the separation of powers.

**[Will you add your name if you agree that Congress must hold a vote to authorize the use of military force in Syria?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Gso9WTsdEmK3vSlx3yCv6qZNTKz419sI)**

Thank you,
Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FvMuRbwq%2BDrDZr%2BjKYss7aZNTKz419sI)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BdalGq4451nPygVzGH%2BtV6ZNTKz419sI).
---

name: Jamie Raskin
subject: Here's how we translate our energy into victories at the polls
body:
Help elect Democrats **Help turn the energy of the resistance into victory at the ballot box. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats:

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c64/836474512/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd")**
_"These are the times that try men's souls. The summer soldier and the sunshine patriot will, in this crisis, shrink from the service of their country; but he or she that stands by it now, will deserve the love and thanks of every man and woman."_ \--Thomas Paine

Friend --

We're hanging tough. In the face of Donald Trump's determination to spread authoritarianism and plutocracy in America, Democrats have been shutting down the most depraved proposals coming from the White House and the GOP.

We stopped them cold when they wanted to throw 24 million people off their ACA health insurance, decimate and block-grant Medicaid, and transfer $800 million up the wealth ladder.

We took to the airports by the tens of thousands to welcome the refugees and immigrants targeted by Trump's first unconstitutional immigration executive order, and we made sure that federal courts across the land enjoined enforcement of these lawless Muslim ban orders.

We have kept the heat on the Russian connection, and we've seen General Michael Flynn resign and Attorney General Jeff Sessions recuse himself -- but we haven't been able to block everything.

They passed legislation that restricts the EPA from basing its decisions on science, and they blew up two centuries of precedent to ram through a justice that couldn't get support from 60 senators. They're trashing access to the courts and tearing apart the possibility of class action lawsuits. They even voted to let your internet service provider sell your browser history without your permission.

There's no alternative but to mobilize even stronger popular resistance. What Trump and the GOP have been doing is a call to action for us all -- and you've responded in force.

You've marched, protested, called, tweeted, and showed up in force at town halls. But, ultimately, we need to make sure that we're replacing slippery Republicans in Congress with strong Democrats who will fight for our values and priorities. And that means we need to translate the energy of the resistance into concrete victories at the polls, starting with upcoming special elections in Georgia and Montana.

So let's make it happen. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats this year and beyond.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c65/836474512/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c62/836474512/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c63/836474512/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c60/836474512/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c61/836474512/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c6e/836474512/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd")
** Thanks a lot. Let's start taking back Congress right now.

Jamie

Jamie Raskin
U.S. Representative, Maryland

P.S. -- I had a great time on tonight's episode of Democrats Live talking about what's going on and how everyone can get involved. **[Check back here if you weren't able to watch live,](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c6f/836474512/VEsO/ "https://live.democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Check+back+here+if+you+werent+able+to+wa&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd")** and please stay in close touch.

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c6c/836474512/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c6d/836474512/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c6a/836474512/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c96e/4067b0a/2eb5d5dc3/7e725c6b/836474512/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170412_jr_nd&source=em_20170412_jr_nd&refcode=em_20170412_jr_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Jeff Weaver, OurRevolution.com
subject: Lessons from last night
body:
We need to show that we are helping candidates that are running to continue what Bernie started.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Let me be blunt. What happened last night in Kansas is proof that voters across the spectrum are fighting back. No Democratic candidate has come as close as James Thompson did. Just five months ago Trump won this district by 27 points; last night Thompson ended up within seven. It is clear that a progressive message is powerful and it is important to build on this success. With an unabashedly and authentically progressive candidate we can succeed in red, purple and blue states.
Despite a large GOTV operation run in support, we missed a huge opportunity to help more in Kansas. A lot of people pitched in financially for James Thompson, but the forces of reaction invested more. There is so much more that Our Revolution does than just raise money for candidates, but the truth is no candidate can win without the resources she or he needs to communicate to voters. Encouraging great candidates to run and then not helping them with the resources they need hurts our movement.
I get it. You are asked by many, many groups and candidates for support. And in our political environment there is no shortage of real crises vying for your attention. But if our political revolution is to succeed, we need to show that we will help candidates that are running to continue what Bernie started. Rob Quist is one of those candidates. We know that progressive candidates can succeed where establishment Democrats have failed so many times before, and where frankly the establishment has surrendered millions of working families to far right Republican rule.
**[I need your help to demonstrate that the political revolution is still a force that the establishment should reckon with. Will you split a $5 contribution between Our Revolution and Rob Quist's campaign?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0af4/43f17890/dd9afe72/6203d4e3/1846494001/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-quist-mfa?refcode=170412-full")**
While Montana's special election began with a presidential appointment, Rob's grassroots campaign had its beginning well beforehand. When Bernie Sanders called for a Medicare for All system during the 2016 presidential primaries, Rob started organizing in his own community to bring this right to his fellow Montanans.
Running for Congress in Montana's at-large congressional district, his campaign is building momentum all across Big Sky Country with unwavering support for health care as a human right. It's clear that Medicare for All is a winning issue with voters of all parties, and that's got Republicans, and special interests who will fight Medicare for All, worried.
Rob's campaign for Congress is special for another reason. In a state that went for Donald Trump by more than 20 points, a Democratic challenger with support from the grassroots is poised to win back a seat in Congress in a nominally "conservative" state. It turns out that when you get down to the issues, progressives do pretty well. We saw this in Kansas, and we will see this in Montana.
I know you have been generous in the past and honestly this will not be the last time I ask you to support a progressive champion this year. But we have come so far in changing politics in America that we cannot let up now. I want to let you know that I will be sending a personal donation to help Rob Quist win. Together we can create the America we all know is possible. As Bernie said in the final email of his campaign: "Forever committed, forever fighting, forever forward!"
**[Split a $5 contribution between Rob Quist's grassroots campaign and Our Revolution and help us demonstrate the strength of the political revolution.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0af4/43f17890/dd9afe72/6203d4e3/1846494001/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-quist-mfa?refcode=170412-full")**
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0af4/43f17890/dd9afe72/6203d4e3/1846494001/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-quist-mfa?refcode=170412-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0af4/43f17890/dd9afe72/6203d4e0/1846494001/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0af4/43f17890/dd9afe72/6203d4e1/1846494001/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0af4/43f17890/dd9afe72/6203d4ee/1846494001/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

Rob's campaign for Congress is special for another reason. In a state that went for Donald Trump by more than 20 points, a Democratic challenger with support from the grassroots is poised to win back a seat in Congress in a nominally "conservative" state. It turns out that when you get down to the issues, progressives do pretty well. We saw this in Kansas, and we will see this in Montana. I know you have been generous in the past and honestly this will not be the last time I ask you to support a progressive champion this year. But we have come so far in changing politics in America that we cannot let up now. I want to let you know that I will be sending a personal donation to help Rob Quist win. Together we can create the America we all know is possible. As Bernie said in the final email of his campaign: "Forever committed, forever fighting, forever forward!" "" In solidarity, Jeff Weaver President Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

name: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
subject: National popular vote. Now.
body:
We can eradicate the Electoral College on a state-by-state basis without a constitutional amendment. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46cf/1c469400/2d1cee8/354949f/649465095/VEsH/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition") Friend, The Electoral College silences the voices of all kinds of people in presidential elections -- but it hits minority voters especially hard. That is not a coincidence. The Electoral College is a relic of slavery, designed to balance the power between slave-owning and non-slave owning states, at a time when African-Americans were considered 3/5s of a person and women didn't vote at all. And yet despite the many overdue advancements to our country over the years, we have retained the relic that is the Electoral College, which to this day disempowers minorities. That's one major reason why we say the Electoral College is undermining the legitimacy of our democracy. It's also a major reason why LegitAction is now officially advocating to replace the Electoral College as it functions today with a national popular vote instead. [**_If you want the Electoral College to stop suppressing the voices of millions of voters, especially minorities, sign LegitAction 's petition in support of the national popular vote today._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46cf/1c469400/2d1cee8/354949c/649465095/VEsE/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+If+you+want+the+Electoral+College+to+sto&utm_campaign=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition") Many of us were outraged by what happened in last year's election. Two of our last three presidents have now taken the White House in defiance of the American voters. That is not legitimate democracy! It is on us to take our anger and frustration and turn it into change. One of the absolutely necessary changes is to eradicate the Electoral College, and we can do it on a state-by-state basis **without a constitutional amendment.** LegitAction is already helping build this movement in Connecticut, and we're planning to expand to every state we can. Now we're organizing supporters behind this effort nationwide. [**_Sign our petition today to show you support a national popular vote that will help restore legitimacy to our presidential elections._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46cf/1c469400/2d1cee8/354949d/649465095/VEsF/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Sign+our+petition+today+to+show+you+supp&utm_campaign=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition") Right now, our country is in a legitimacy crisis. We are being governed by someone we, the voters, did not choose. The voices of certain minority groups are being especially targeted. Ending the Electoral College is one key step we can take to restore our democratic legitimacy. Thank you for standing up for legitimacy today, Russ Feingold
| [SIGN ON](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46cf/1c469400/2d1cee8/354949a/649465095/VEsC/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46cf/1c469400/2d1cee8/354949b/649465095/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition&source=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46cf/1c469400/2d1cee8/3549498/649465095/VEsA/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition&source=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition"). | Authorized and paid for by LegitPAC
---

Middleton, WI 53562

[Privacy Policy](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46cf/1c469400/2d1cee8/3549499/649465095/VEsB/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/content/legitpac-privacy-policy/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=7+-+Privacy+Policy&utm_campaign=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition&source=20170412_r4w_NPV_petition")

name: Maggie for NH Polling Team
subject: APPROVAL POLL: Spicer, Bannon, and Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7c/2a380d31/15982e21/feff97/3057241667/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7c/2a380d31/15982e21/feff97/3057241667/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
The Trump administration is coming up on its 100th day in office, and we're running a short approval poll about Donald Trump and his top officials.
[**Will you answer these 5 questions about Donald Trump, Steve Bannon, and Sean Spicer?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7c/2a380d31/15982e21/feff90/3057241667/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170412_100days-approval-poll_nd?source=e20170412_100approval_nd")
Steve Bannon, Trump's chief strategist and former heard of _Breitbart News_ , is known for his anti-Semitic, bigoted, misogynistic, and homophobic agenda. As Trump's right-hand man, he's in the Oval Office influencing policy decisions.
Sean Spicer, the White House press secretary, hits President Obama every chance he gets. He repeats baseless and discredited attacks like that Obama wiretapped Trump tower, and his bumbling around concerns that Russia interfered with the 2016 election have made him a regular feature on _Saturday Night Live._
Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominee was just rammed through the Senate and confirmed with almost no bipartisan support. Trump has also spent his first months in office attacking health care, imposing un-American travel bans, and quietly tearing away our right to Internet privacy.
**Team, your opinion is important to us.[Will you please take this short approval poll before the Trump administration reaches its 100th day in office?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7c/2a380d31/15982e21/feff90/3057241667/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170412_100days-approval-poll_nd?source=e20170412_100approval_nd")**
Thanks for sharing your thoughts,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7c/2a380d31/15982e21/feff91/3057241667/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQxMl8xMDBhcHByb3ZhbF9uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170412_100approval_nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7c/2a380d31/15982e21/feff92/3057241667/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
